positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of cosmic flora and fauna intertwined with geometric patterns. The central motif features a stylized celestial crescent moon embraced by bioluminescent, flowing vines and oversized, stylized tropical leaves. Incorporate elements of ancient mythology (e.g., stylized constellations, abstract celestial bodies) rendered in deep indigo, emerald green, burnt gold, and creamy white. The style must be clean vector illustration, high-contrast flat graphic design with subtle gradient glows, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be centered and balanced, allowing for clean cropping on fabric.
